2026-04-15T05:15:33.5331318Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5332208Z ---
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5332575Z description: |
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5333074Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5333894Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5334753Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5335230Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5335387Z on:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5335722Z   push:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5336059Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5336457Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5336694Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5336861Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5337099Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5337251Z network: defaults
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5337476Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5337632Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5338016Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5338464Z   create-issue:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5338821Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5339145Z   noop:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5339484Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5339886Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5340214Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5340830Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5350724Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5351292Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5352016Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5352529Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5352913Z         actions: write
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5353300Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5353693Z       steps:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5354075Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5354601Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5355075Z           env:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5355663Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5356356Z           with:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5356712Z             script: |
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5357220Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5357862Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5358530Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5359130Z                 return;
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5359514Z               }
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5359723Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5360200Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5360928Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5361419Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5362057Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5362882Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5363700Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5364595Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5365184Z               }
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5365404Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5365812Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5366439Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5366917Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5367449Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5367926Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5368431Z               });
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5368905Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-15T05:15:33.5379296Z   report-failure-as-issue: false

2026-04-15T05:15:33.5380103Z     max: 1

2026-04-15T05:15:33.5381197Z   jobs:

2026-04-15T05:15:33.5483684Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5484133Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5484638Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5485184Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5485564Z         actions: write
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5485958Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5486345Z       steps:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5486733Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5487246Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5544454Z           env:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5545221Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5546002Z           with:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5546373Z             script: |
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5546906Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5547548Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5548231Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5549136Z                 return;
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5549521Z               }
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5549729Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5549969Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5550676Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5551187Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5551949Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5552816Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5553637Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5554654Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5555255Z               }
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5555463Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5555734Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5556320Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5556794Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5557312Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5557783Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5558287Z               });
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5558760Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5559179Z 
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5559331Z tools:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5559654Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5560004Z   github:
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5560359Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]

2026-04-15T05:15:33.5562965Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5563665Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-15T05:15:33.5578334Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
